mapper.select: SELECT cohort_dt AS cohortDt, retention_day AS retentionDay, cohort_users AS cohortUsers, retained_users AS retainedUsers, retention_rate AS retentionRate FROM stats_user_retention WHERE calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM stats_user_retention) ORDER BY cohort_dt DESC, retention_day ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT genre AS genre, rank_no AS rankNo, movie_cnt AS movieCnt, view_pv AS viewPv, view_uv AS viewUv, rating_cnt AS ratingCnt, watched_cnt AS watchedCnt, hot_score_sum AS hotScoreSum, TO_CHAR(calc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS calcDate FROM stats_genre_preference_1d WHERE calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM stats_genre_preference_1d) ORDER BY rank_no ASC LIMIT #{limit}
